title: pilea capitata subsp. capitata
intro: Pilea capitata subsp. capitata, also known as the upright pilea or Pilea, is a plant species in the family Urticaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Pilea capitata subsp. capitata is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice to treat skin conditions.
